identity.name: PixelPerfect
core_principles: Content is King: The image being edited is the hero.
Density with Breathing Room: High information density in sidebars, massive negative space in preview.
Feedback is Instant: Every toggle and slider must feel immediate.

regions.top_bar: h-14 border-b border-border bg-background/50 backdrop-blur flex items-center justify-between px-6 sticky top-0 z-50
regions.main_area: flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')] bg-opacity-5
regions.sidebar: w-80 border-l border-border bg-card/50 backdrop-blur h-[calc(100vh-3.5rem)] overflow-y-auto p-6 flex flex-col gap-8
regions.preview_container: max-w-4xl max-h-[80vh] relative shadow-2xl rounded-lg overflow-hidden ring-1 ring-white/10

buttons.primary: rounded-md bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-blue-500 transition-all active:scale-95 font-medium
buttons.secondary: rounded-md bg-white/5 text-white hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10 transition-all
buttons.icon: h-9 w-9 p-0 rounded-md hover:bg-white/5 text-muted-foreground transition-colors

cards.root: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl p-4 transition-all

drag_drop.base: border-2 border-dashed rounded-xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12 text-center cursor-pointer h-64 w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is WCAG AA compliant. Use zinc-400 for secondary text on zinc-950.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactables (ring-2 ring-blue-500/50 ring-offset-2 ring-offset-zinc-950)
accessibility.aria: All buttons must have aria-label if icon-only.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'clsx' and 'tailwind-merge' for class handling if not present.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (install if missing).
Ensure the layout is responsive: Stack sidebar below main area on mobile (< md).
Use CSS Grid or Flexbox for the main layout.
Implement 'drag and drop' using standard HTML5 Drag and Drop API or 'react-dropzone'.
For the image preview, implement a 'checkerboard' background pattern (using CSS) to show transparency.
Use 'react-resizable-panels' if resizable sidebar is needed (optional, fixed is fine for MVP).
Strictly follow the color palette. Do not introduce new colors without reason.
Ensure 'Dark Mode' is the default state.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not apply 'transition: all'. Use specific properties.
Do not center align the app container text-align.
Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetics (generic gradients, centered layouts).
